overview.title: Project health
overview.subtitle: Every project's progress, setup, and activity at a glance.
overview.workloadSubtitle: Who’s on the clock and how much is on their plate.

auth.emailSignInError: That email or password is incorrect.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: Internal tool — Progix team only.
signIn.limited: Access is limited to Progix organization members.
signIn.accessDenied: That account isn’t a member of the Progix organization, so it can’t access progixHub.
signIn.somethingWrong: Something went wrong signing in. Please try again.

appError.title: Something went wrong
appError.body: An unexpected error occurred. Try again, or reload the page.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.githubHint: Link a real repo — we’ll verify it exists.
projects.gh_notRepoUrl: That doesn’t look like a GitHub repo URL.
projects.gh_repoUnreachable: Couldn’t reach GitHub — you can still save the link.
projects.emptyBody: Create your first project, then link its Notion, Slack, GitHub, and live site.
projects.readOnlyNotice: Read-only access — ask a PM to make changes.
projects.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete “{name}” and all its data? This can’t be undone.

envVars.title: Environment variables
envVars.subtitle: Encrypted at rest · reveals and copies are audited.
envVars.hintKeepValue: leave blank to keep the current value
envVars.hintLogo: for the logo — auto-detected, override if needed
envVars.empty: No variables yet — add the first one to keep this project’s secrets in one secured place.
envVars.errorDuplicate: A variable with that key already exists in this project.
envVars.errorNoEncryption: Encryption isn’t configured — contact an admin.
envVars.errorNotFound: That variable could not be found.
envVars.errorDecrypt: This value can’t be decrypted — the encryption key may have changed.
envVars.hintScope: where it’s used — auto-detected, override if needed
envVars.importEmpty: Drop a file or paste above to preview variables.
envVars.importNoneSelected: Select at least one variable to import.
envVars.errorImportInvalid: Couldn’t read those variables — check the format.
envVars.errorExportEmpty: No variables to export for that scope.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Files, links, and notes for this project.
documents.notePreviewHint: Your note preview appears here as you type.
documents.confirmArchive: Archive “{title}”? You can restore it later.
documents.emptyAll: No documents yet — upload a file, add a link, or write a note.
documents.emptyFiles: No files yet — upload one to keep it with this project.
documents.emptyLinks: No links yet — add an external URL.
documents.errorUrlScheme: Use an http:// or https:// URL
documents.errorFileType: Unsupported file type — use PDF, DOCX, an image, or ZIP.
documents.errorFileSize: File is too large — the limit is 50 MB.
documents.errorUpload: Couldn’t upload that file — please try again.
documents.errorFileNotFound: That file could not be found.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Personalize how progixHub looks for you.
settings.languageHelp: The app’s own copy. Your projects, env vars, and documents stay as you wrote them.
settings.themeHelp: Use a light or dark interface.
settings.saveError: Couldn’t save your settings — please try again.

portal.title: Client portal
portal.subtitle: What you’ve shipped, organized for the client.
portal.shareHelpNone: Create a private link the client can open — no account needed.
portal.shareHelpActive: Anyone with this link can view the portal, comment, attach files, and propose features.
portal.linkOnce: Copy it now — for security, the full link is shown only once.
portal.confirmRotate: Rotate the share link? The current link stops working immediately.
portal.confirmRevoke: Revoke the share link? The client loses access until you create a new one.
portal.confirmArchiveBlock: Archive “{name}”? Its features will be hidden from the portal too.
portal.emptyPortal: No blocks yet — create one (e.g. “App”, “Backend”, “Website”) and add the features you’ve shipped.
portal.emptyBlock: No features in this block yet.
portal.proposalsInboxHelp: Submitted by the client — accept one by editing it into a block and status, or archive it.
portal.confirmArchiveCard: Archive “{title}”? It disappears from the portal.
portal.publicIntro: Shared by the Progix team — explore what’s been built and tell us what you think.
portal.proposeHelp: Tell us what you’d like — it lands on the team’s board as a proposal.
portal.proposeSent: Sent — the team will review your proposal.
portal.inactiveTitle: This link is no longer active
portal.inactiveBody: Ask your Progix contact for a fresh link.
portal.errorRateLimited: Too many submissions at once — wait a minute and try again.
portal.errorCapReached: This portal has reached its submission limit — contact the team directly.
portal.errorLinkInactive: This link is no longer active.
portal.errorFileType: Unsupported file type — use PDF, DOCX, an image, or ZIP.
portal.errorFileSize: File is too large — the limit is 10 MB.
portal.errorUpload: Couldn’t upload that file — please try again.
portal.errorGeneric: Something went wrong — please try again.

people.title: People
people.subtitle: Who’s on this project and what they can do.
people.errorNoAccount: No progixHub account has that email yet.
people.errorLastPm: A project must keep at least one PM — assign another PM first.
people.errorNotAuthorized: Only a PM can manage people.
people.errorGeneric: Something went wrong — please try again.

errors.notAuthorized: You aren’t authorized to do that.
errors.tryAgain: Something went wrong — please try again.

team.title: Create member account
team.subtitle: Add a teammate who can sign in with email and password.
team.success: Created {email} — they can sign in now.
team.errorDuplicate: An account with that email already exists.
team.errorGeneric: Couldn’t create the account — please try again.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Everyone in the Progix org and what they can do.
members.activityUnavailable: GitHub activity isn’t available for this member yet.
members.contributionsTotal: {count} contributions in the org this year
members.errorSelf: You can’t change your own role.
members.errorSuperadmin: Superadmins are above org roles and can’t be changed here.
members.errorGeneric: Something went wrong — please try again.
members.connectPrompt: Link your GitHub to show your activity here.
members.connectError: Couldn’t start the GitHub connection — please try again.
members.linkConflict: That GitHub account is already linked to another member.

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.subtitle: The platforms we set up for clients — configured once, reused on every project.
platforms.patternKey: Client stores a key with us
platforms.fieldCritical: Critical — never share credentials, only invite
platforms.deleteConfirm: Delete “{name}” from the registry? This can’t be undone.
platforms.noTutorialsLeft: No more tutorials to add. Create them in Tutorials.

tutorials.title: Tutorials
tutorials.subtitle: How-to videos for the platforms we set up — recorded once, reused everywhere.
tutorials.guideHint:
## Create your account
1. Go to …
2. Click **Sign up** …

> Tip: use your work email.
tutorials.guidePreviewHint: Write the detailed steps on the left — the formatted guide appears here.
tutorials.errorLink: Paste a YouTube, Loom or Vimeo link
tutorials.fileKeepHint: Leave empty to keep the current file.

setup.title: Client setup page
setup.subtitle: Build a guided page the client opens to set up accounts and grant access.
setup.issuedTitle: Share these with the client — shown once
setup.issuedHint: Rotate to get a fresh link + passcode. We don’t store the passcode.
setup.noPlatforms: Add platforms in Settings → Platforms first.
setup.pickPlatforms: Pick the platforms the client must set up:
setup.editHint: Add or remove platforms. Steps the client already finished keep their progress, and the link stays the same.
setup.clientIntro: Follow each step to create your accounts and give us access.
setup.inviteInstruction: Open the settings below and invite {email} as {role}.
setup.keyInstruction: Create the value and send it to us to store securely: {label}
setup.gateBody: Your project team gave you a passcode for this page.
setup.gateHelp: Don’t have a passcode? Ask your Progix contact.

dossier.title: Client
dossier.subtitle: Team-only context on the client — never shown to them.

releaseNotes.title: Release notes
releaseNotes.subtitle: A changelog for this project. Published entries appear on the client portal.
releaseNotes.errorInvalid: Please add a title and notes.
releaseNotes.errorNotAuthorized: You don’t have permission to manage release notes.
releaseNotes.errorNotConfigured: AI drafting isn’t configured yet (missing OpenAI key).
releaseNotes.errorNoActivity: Not enough recent activity to draft from.
releaseNotes.errorFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

digests.title: Weekly digest
digests.subtitle: An AI summary of this project’s past week — reports, activity, and progress.
digests.emptyManager: No digest yet — generate one to summarize this week.
digests.errorNotAuthorized: You don’t have permission to generate a digest.
digests.errorNotConfigured: AI digests aren’t configured yet (missing OpenAI key).
digests.errorNoActivity: Not enough activity this week to summarize.
digests.errorFailed: Couldn’t generate the digest. Please try again.

reports.title: Post a daily report
reports.subtitle: Pick a project and drop in a markdown update — visible to that project’s team.
reports.previewHint: Your report preview appears here as you type.
reports.errorEmpty: Choose a project and write the report
reports.sectionSubtitle: Markdown updates posted by the team for this project.
